name: vscode-tapsense
description: Detects single, double, and triple knock gestures on your MacBook via accelerometer sidecar

tapsense.sidecarPath.description: Path to the tapsense-sidecar binary. If empty, uses the built binary in the repo.

tapsense.simulateMode.description: Run sidecar in --simulate mode (no real accelerometer needed).

tapsense.mode.description: Detection profile to pass to the sidecar.

tapsense.sensitivity.description: Detection sensitivity to pass to the sidecar.

tapsense.autoStart.description: Automatically start listening on extension activation.

tapsense.singleKnock.command.description: VS Code command id to run on a single knock. Can target another extension's command.

tapsense.singleKnock.args.description: Arguments passed to the single-knock command.

tapsense.singleKnock.showNotification.description: Show a VS Code notification when a single knock is detected.

tapsense.doubleKnock.command.description: VS Code command id to run on a double knock. Can target another extension's command.

tapsense.doubleKnock.args.description: Arguments passed to the double-knock command.

tapsense.doubleKnock.showNotification.description: Show a VS Code notification when a double knock is detected.

tapsense.tripleKnock.command.description: VS Code command id to run on a triple knock. Can target another extension's command.

tapsense.tripleKnock.args.description: Arguments passed to the triple-knock command.

tapsense.tripleKnock.showNotification.description: Show a VS Code notification when a triple knock is detected.
